title: [UNSUPPORTED] Vanadium+
description: The Vanadium modpack with Hud changes, GUI changes
body:
# Vanadium+ End-of-Life ## The Vanadium modpack has reached it's point where it is pointless to have a 'Plus' Version Visit the original (now reworked) modpack here: [![Vanadium EOL](https://i.imgur.com/7N5N0va.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanadiummodpack) ----------- ![Vanadium+ - Vanadium Reloaded, Better Menu and Performance](https://i.imgur.com/MDp3soK.png) ![Better hud, Showcasing pictures](https://i.imgur.com/D6iLLWc.png) ![Preinstalled, servers, resource packs and more!](https://i.imgur.com/e00yO65.png) -------------------
This modpack reintruduces Vanadium with more tweaks in HUD and GUI. Made for survival (too). -------------------
Versions

| | | |---------------------|:---------------------:| |[![Vanadium+ (Selected Version)](https://i.imgur.com/LGsiaXl.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanadium+) |[![Vanadium](https://i.imgur.com/P6XRBrb.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanadiummodpack) | -----------------
